name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Purpose
title: R5: Why this EvidenceVariable is defined (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.purpose` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.purpose` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.purpose` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.purpose` has a context of EvidenceVariable based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.purpose` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Why this EvidenceVariable is defined (new)
element.comment:
Element `EvidenceVariable.purpose` has a context of EvidenceVariable based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.purpose` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element does not describe the usage of the EvidenceVariable. Instead, it provides traceability of ''why'' the resource is either needed or ''why'' it is defined as it is. This may be used to point to source materials or specifications that drove the structure of this EvidenceVariable.

element.definition: Explanation of why this EvidenceVariable is needed and why it has been designed as it has.
